note: VK primary, Yandex RSYA fallback. Update IDs when partner cabinets change.

formats.top: Adaptive horizontal banner — page headers, tools, articles.
formats.promoInfeed: Adaptive rectangle for promo catalog cards — 300x250 area, in-feed.
formats.mobileAnchor: Floor / bottom banner — 320x50. Yandex uses floorAd on fallback.
formats.fullscreen: Fullscreen interstitial for game overlays. Yandex fallback is mobile-only.

promoInfeed.label: Promo in-feed card
promoInfeed.usage: promo catalog in-feed between cards only

mobileAnchor.label: Mobile anchor
mobileAnchor.usage: fixed bottom banner on long pages
